one_liner: Multi-model idea refinement pipeline that produces validated, approved specs for development.
problem_statement: Raw project ideas lack the structure, completeness, and specificity needed to start development. Manual spec writing is time-consuming and biased by a single perspective.

must.text: Accept free-form text input describing a project idea
Support iterative user feedback with structured review protocol
Heuristic scoring of expansions before synthesis
JSON schema validation at pipeline boundaries

should.text: Track and display cost with configurable cap
Show source attribution for each requirement

could.text: Provide diff view between spec versions
Cache expansion results for minor feedback rounds

wont.rationale: Out of scope — handled by Conductor

decisions_needed.question: Should the tool explain prioritisation reasoning to the user?
decisions_needed.recommendation: Yes, include brief rationale per requirement

assumptions.assumption: All three model CLIs are installed and on PATH

success_criteria: User can go from raw idea to approved spec in under 10 minutes
Approved spec has zero unresolved decisions
All MUST requirements have clear acceptance criteria
Pipeline completes in under 60 seconds per iteration
All output artifacts pass JSON schema validation

risks.risk: Model API rate limits during parallel calls
Ambiguous input leads to divergent expansions
Users overwhelmed by too many decisions
risks.mitigation: Batch and surface only critical decisions first

requirements_must.rationale: Best structured requirements with clear boundaries

risks.rationale: Most thorough risk analysis with concrete mitigations

assumptions.rationale: Best identified user-facing assumptions needing confirmation
